project_type: AWS CDK (Python) serverless sleep audio processing pipeline
build_system: pip + CDK CLI (npx cdk). NODE_OPTIONS env must be unset before running python or cdk commands due to sandbox conflict.
test_framework: pytest with conftest.py fixtures providing CDK template assertions. Lambda handler tests import directly from lambda/ directory via sys.path manipulation.
build_command: unset NODE_OPTIONS && cd /projects/sandbox/cdk-sleep-py-kiro && npx cdk synth -c environment=dev --quiet
test_command: unset NODE_OPTIONS && cd /projects/sandbox/cdk-sleep-py-kiro && python3 -m pytest tests/ -v
verification_instructions: 1. Run pytest to ensure all tests pass. 2. Run cdk synth -c environment=dev to verify CloudFormation synthesis. 3. Run cdk synth -c environment=prod to verify prod env synthesizes.
setup_instructions: pyenv global 3.11.15 && pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - pip installs and npm work. Must unset NODE_OPTIONS before running python/cdk. No Docker daemon available. No real AWS services to test against.
contribution_requirements: Strict TDD: write failing tests first, then implement minimal code. Conventional commit messages. Update ARCHITECTURE.md with Mermaid diagrams after changes.
key_patterns: CDK stack in cdk_base/cdk_base_stack.py defines all infrastructure. Lambda handler in lambda/sleep_audio_processor/handler.py. Tests in tests/unit/ use conftest.py fixtures (template, app). Lambda tests import handler directly and mock context. Output bucket is created but NOT stored as instance variable - need to add reference. Input bucket stored as local var input_bucket. Lambda has TABLE_NAME env var and DynamoDB grant already. Polly task currently uses placeholder params.
directory_structure: Root: app.py (CDK entry), cdk_base/ (stack definitions), lambda/sleep_audio_processor/ (Lambda code), tests/unit/ (pytest tests), tests/conftest.py (shared fixtures)
